category_sources: source_facts.description says it calculates McCabe-style cyclomatic complexity for C/C++ code; official GitLab project information says McCabe-style complexity and line counting for C and C++.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pmccabe; official GitLab project is named pmccabe.
docs_sources: Official GitLab project links a README; no separate official documentation site was confirmed.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/pmccabe/pmccabe, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify complexity/code-change tools; official GitLab project describes C/C++ complexity and line counting.
